Pulse · Howler
Howler presents

Pulse.
Your event’s data, finally working for you.

Howler is the Experience Operating System for live events, and Pulse is our new flagship product: one white-label platform that turns your ticketing, cashless and web data into insight, action and results, in your brand, on your phone.

How event teams work today

Five tools. Zero loop.

📊

The dashboard tool

Shows you the problem, then leaves. Acting means exporting and switching apps.

📧

The email tool

Audiences go stale the moment you upload them. No connection to live sales.

💬

The group chats

Approvals, settlements and “did you see this?” scattered and lost.

🌙

Event night

You find out about the problem when the queue does, or the morning after.

Every tool sees a slice. Nobody sees the loop, and the data never learns.

The Pulse loop

Insight → Action → Results.
On repeat.

📡

Data lands

Ticketing, cashless & web, live.

🦉

The Owl reads it

What changed, and what to do.

⚡

You act

One tap to the right campaign.

📈

Results return

Tracked back onto your dashboards.

🔁

It tightens

Every cycle sharper than the last.

See

Open the app and you already know.

Live dashboards with the Owl one tap away. Screens and numbers are illustrative.

The honest comparison

Why Pulse, and not another tool.

If you’re using…The gapWhat Pulse changes
A dashboard toolSee the problem, export, switch tools to act.See it and act on it in the same governed place.
An email toolAudiences go stale the moment you upload them.Audiences built from live data, fresh at send time.
Email + chat threadsApprovals and settlements get lost.One tracked inbox; settlements file themselves.
Gut feel on event nightYou find out when the queue does.A live ops board and a report to your phone every 30 minutes.

Pulse isn’t another tool on the pile. It replaces the pile with a loop.

The pitch, in one line

See what’s happening, act on it, and prove the results, on a loop, in one governed place.
